title: Delete or Reassign Title Column
excerpt: Would be great to have the ability to delete, hide or select a specific column to replace the title column (including mirrored columns) . As an example, I am creating an employee schedule using our CRM board and am mirro…

posts.author: oliverchem (Oliver)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to have the ability to delete, hide or select a specific column to replace the title column (including mirrored columns) . As an example, I am creating an employee schedule using our CRM board and am mirroring Name, Phone and Email address. It would be nice to have the Name column as the title column, but since we can’t change that column it’s now just a useless, redundant column as I need the name column to be there first/title column, but also require it to be a mirrored column so I can have content automatically load from the workbook i’m mirroring from.
